overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character wearing a horned hat riding a horse through a heavy snowstorm. The journey progresses from a frozen riverside forest through open snowy hills and into a narrow rocky mountain pass.

events.description: leaving the frozen river behind as the trail turns inland away from the water

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along the bank of a frozen river through dense snow-covered pine forest

entered.detail: partially frozen river with snow-covered banks running parallel to the trail
tall evergreen trees heavily laden with snow forming a dense forest wall
deep snow covering the trail and surrounding terrain
small leafless bushes covered in snow lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a rider on horseback traveling alongside a frozen river. Dense snow-covered pine trees line the right side while the river flows on the left. Heavy snowfall reduces visibility as the horse trots steadily forward along the snow-covered trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy hillside with distant mountain slopes

events.description: exiting the dense riverside forest into open rolling snow-covered hills
large rock formations become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: riding uphill through open snow fields with scattered vegetation and distant mountain views

entered.detail: rolling snow-covered mountain slopes rising in the background
massive boulders and rock outcroppings visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The rider emerges from the forest into a wide-open snowy landscape. The frozen river is left behind as the terrain opens up to reveal rolling snow-covered hills and distant mountain slopes. Sparse bushes dot the landscape, and large rock formations become visible ahead as the horse continues its steady climb.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass between large boulders

events.description: entering a narrow rocky mountain pass with large boulders flanking both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating the horse through a narrow valley between large snow-covered rock formations

entered.detail: large rocks and boulders covered in snow lining the narrow path

segments.scene_description: The rider enters a narrow mountain pass where massive rock formations close in on both sides. The open hills give way to an enclosed valley with snow-covered boulders flanking the trail. The horse continues forward through the increasingly confined snowy terrain as the rocks tower above on either side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a rider on horseback travels from a secluded frozen riverside forest into a confined rocky mountain pass. It begins with the horse trotting along a snow-covered trail flanked by a flowing river and dense pine trees under a heavy snowfall. As the rider emerges from the forest, the terrain opens up into a wide landscape of rolling snowy hills and sparse bushes, leaving the river behind. The scene then shifts as the horse climbs toward distant slopes, where the open vistas gradually give way to massive rock formations. Finally, the path narrows into an enclosed valley, with towering snow-covered boulders closing in on both sides of the trail.
